items.title: 4-0. Chris Darnell's Kings squad is rolling through their early summer league schedule. It hasn't always been pretty but after going undefeated at the Cal Classic, the Kings picked up a win in their first game in Vegas, this time beating the Clippers by a final of 91-85. Here are
items.author: James Ham
items.body_excerpt: 4-0. Chris Darnell's Kings squad is rolling through their early summer league schedule. It hasn't always been pretty but after going undefeated at the Cal Classic, the Kings picked up a win in their first game in Vegas, this time beating the Clippers by a final of 91-85. Here are six quick thoughts:

items.title: Final score: Kings 91, Clippers 85
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Final score: Kings 91, Clippers 85

More fouls between the two teams (55) than buckets (46)

Dylan Cardwell: 15 points, 5/8 FGs, 9 rebounds (9 fouls), 2 blocks, 3/3 FTs

Keaton Wagler: 7 points, 1/7 FGs
Darius Acuff: 19 points, 6/20 FGs

Clippers off until Sunday

items.title: Final: Kings 91, Clippers 85. Keaton Wagler scored 7 points in his Clippers debut. Cam Christie led with 15 points and 8 rebounds. Sean Pedulla and Nick Martinelli each had 11 off the bench. Baba Miller scored 12. Clippers next play on Sunday against Utah.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Kings 91, Clippers 85. Keaton Wagler scored 7 points in his Clippers debut. Cam Christie led with 15 points and 8 rebounds. Sean Pedulla and Nick Martinelli each had 11 off the bench. Baba Miller scored 12. Clippers next play on Sunday against Utah.

items.title: Dylan Cardwell has nine fouls once again
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: Dylan Cardwell has nine fouls once again

items.title: overtimes shouldn't be allowed in summer league
items.author: Oh No He Didn't
items.body_excerpt:
overtimes shouldn't be allowed in summer league

have it end in a draw

items.title: The Clippers made 2 field goals in the second quarter
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
The Clippers made 2 field goals in the second quarter

They made 2 field goals in the third quarter

But they have made FOUR field goals just in the last 2:07 while going on a 10-0 run capped by a Fletcher Loyer 3

Kings need a timeout

4:00 left and Kings lead down to 83-77

items.title: Clippers have rattled off a 12-2 run to pull within 83-77 with exactly four minutes to play.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Clippers have rattled off a 12-2 run to pull within 83-77 with exactly four minutes to play.

Kings lead Clippers 70-58 through three quarters

Clippers have put together one of the more unfortunate offensive performances I've ever seen in summer league 

25.6% FGs
6 assists
17 turnovers

One more quarter to go thoooooooo

items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever storm back to win in Phoenix 92-89. Kelsey Mitchell (29pts) scored the go-ahead bucket. Ty Harris, starting, scored 15 and Boston added 21/9.

Huge to complete the comeback and get a needed win after a loss last night. They’ll finish the road trip Sunday in Vegas.

items.title: It's halftime
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
It's halftime

Kings up 44-41

I'm just gonna be real with y'all

It's been a lot of people watching people movement and small talk 

So I'm gonna have to watch this jawn back and get back to you on some real takes lol... but I'm in here at least. appreciate y'all understanding!

items.title: The Fever fell down by double digits TWICE in that game. But they battled back each time, then made several clutch plays. Ty Harris and the available stars were great. Fever beat the Mercury 92-89 and improve to 13-9 at the season's halfway point.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: The Fever fell down by double digits TWICE in that game. But they battled back each time, then made several clutch plays. Ty Harris and the available stars were great. Fever beat the Mercury 92-89 and improve to 13-9 at the season's halfway point.

items.title: In a highly anticipated match-up between the #1 and #2 pick. AJ Dybantsa drops 27 points, 7 rebounds, 2 assists, and 3 stocks on 7-18 FG | 0-5 3PT | 7-8 FT with a win while Darryn Peterson scores 24 points, 3 rebounds, 3 assists, and 1 block on 6-18 FG | 2-7 3PT | 6-8 FG
items.author: catreyka
items.body_excerpt: Box Score This game was a banger. Dybantsa was an absolute delight to watch. He is incredibly aggressive and not afraid of being physical whatsover. His potential in the league feels sky-high and I can't wait to see him more in the regular season. Peterson didn't exactly have…

items.title: Bizarre play as Peterson refused to give his tenth foul and they let Wizards run clock out instead. Wizards win 92-88. Dybantsa with 27 points, Tre Johnson with 26, Darryn Peterson with 24.
items.author: John Hollinger

items.title: Watkins gave Peterson a bump, and Peterson just lost his head and shoved the guy to the ground.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Watkins gave Peterson a bump, and Peterson just lost his head and shoved the guy to the ground. 

They're reviewing for a flagrant, but I think correct call should be foul on Watkins and tech on Peterson.

items.title: It was a little jarring at first to see Kylian Mbappé keel and ask out of the game.
items.author: Matt Norlander
items.body_excerpt:
It was a little jarring at first to see Kylian Mbappé keel and ask out of the game.

And that's about all the drama we got on Thursday in Foxborough.

The best soccer player in the world may or may not be 100% next Tuesday, but his status probably won't matter.

France looks unbeatable.

media.title: Kylian Mbappe downplays ankle injury after France secure World Cup semifinal spot: 'Everything is OK'
media.description: France are so dominant, the only element of drama so far is whether or not the best player in the world will be 100% for Tuesday's semifinal
